html:
2026-0300
2026-03-30IRCC, TBFinancial Administration ActAdjustment of Certain Fees Under the Passport and Other Travel Document Services Fees Regulations Remission OrderAdjustment of Certain Fees Under the Passport and Other Travel Document Services Fees Regulations Remission Order in order to (1) remit the actual and anticipated outstanding debts resulting from the non-collection of passport fee increases; (2) remit the debt for uncollected Passport Program fee increases resulting from the department of Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada’s (IRCC) non-application of the adjustment formulas found in the previous version of the Passport and Other Travel Document Services Fees Regulations from April 1, 2025, to January 25, 2026; and (3) remit the debt for uncollected Passport Program fee increases resulting from IRCC’s non-application of indexation requirements under the Service Fees Act for three Passport Program fees from April 1, 2019, to March 30, 2027.N/A
subject: Adjustment of Certain Fees Under the Passport and Other Travel Document Services Fees Regulations Remission Order
precis: Adjustment of Certain Fees Under the Passport and Other Travel Document Services Fees Regulations Remission Order in order to (1) remit the actual and anticipated outstanding debts resulting from the non-collection of passport fee increases; (2) remit the debt for uncollected Passport Program fee increases resulting from the department of Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada’s (IRCC) non-application of the adjustment formulas found in the previous version of the Passport and Other Travel Document Services Fees Regulations from April 1, 2025, to January 25, 2026; and (3) remit the debt for uncollected Passport Program fee increases resulting from IRCC’s non-application of indexation requirements under the Service Fees Act for three Passport Program fees from April 1, 2019, to March 30, 2027.
